mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_document_permission ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document_permission (target_id, target_type, user_id, permission_level, create_time) VALUES (#{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{userId}, #{permissionLevel}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document_permission SET permission_level = #{permissionLevel} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_document_permission WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM kb_document_permission WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND user_id = #{userId}
